content_of_post_to_comment: Hello my dear friends, It’s almost 5 p.m. and I just woke up after spending all night in the ER. Looks like I may be dealing with a partial obstruction, so work had to wait. I see all your comments. Your likes. Your restacks. Your love. Your support. And thank you. Truly. I’ll get to everything at some point. Please forgive me if I’m a little slow right now. You guys are awesome. Life can be hard. People can be wonderful. And you’ve reminded me of that once again. Please take care of yourselves. Eat. Rest. Stay healthy. And don’t wait for your body to force you to slow down. Hopefully tomorrow will be a little kinder. Thank you for being here. Ren
